pairs.question: Who wrote the play 'Fetch Clay, Make Man'?
pairs.answer: The play 'Fetch Clay, Make Man' was written by Will Power, an award-winning performer and playwright.

pairs.question: What historical figures does 'Fetch Clay, Make Man' depict a friendship between?
pairs.answer: The play explores the unlikely friendship between Muhammad Ali and Stepin Fetchit, two influential American cultural icons.

pairs.question: What is the setting of 'Fetch Clay, Make Man'?
pairs.answer: The play is set within the days leading up to one of the most anticipated fights between Muhammad Ali and Sonny Liston.

pairs.question: How long was 'Fetch Clay, Make Man' in development before its opening in 2010?
pairs.answer: 'Fetch Clay, Make Man' was in development for 3 years prior to its opening at the McCarter Theater Center in 2010.

pairs.question: Who directed the New York premiere of 'Fetch Clay, Make Man' in 2013?
pairs.answer: The New York premiere of 'Fetch Clay, Make Man' in 2013 was directed by Des McAnuff.

pairs.question: What notable actors have been part of the cast of 'Fetch Clay, Make Man'?
pairs.answer: The play has featured actors such as Sonequa Martin-Green, Ben Vereen, K. Todd Freeman, Nikki M. James, Ray Fisher, Danielle Deadwyler, Alexis Floyd, John Earl Jelks, and Edwin Lee Gibson.

pairs.question: Provide a code snippet to search for a list of productions of 'Fetch Clay, Make Man' using a hypothetical API.
pairs.answer:
python
import requests

# Hypothetical API endpoint to fetch productions of 'Fetch Clay, Make Man'
response = requests.get('https://api.theatredb.com/productions', params={'title': 'Fetch Clay, Make Man'})
productions = response.json()

# Print the list of productions
for production in productions:
    print(f"Title: {production['title']}")
    print(f"Year: {production['year']}")
    print(f"Director: {production['director']}")
    print("---")
